testcase.name: test_suppression_prevents_alert

testcase.name: test_monitor_system_resources_handles_errors
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO __name__:performance_monitor.py:97 PerformanceMonitor initialized WARNING __name__:performance_monitor.py:279 Performance alert: memory_usage exceeded warning threshold: 0 > 0.8 WARNING __name__:performance_monitor.py:279 Performance alert: memory_usage exceeded error threshold: 0 > 0.9 WARNING __name__:performance_monitor.py:279 Performance alert: memory_usage exceeded critical threshold: 0 > 0.95 ERROR __name__:performance_monitor.py:326 Error monitoring system resources: cpu fail --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_get_recent_alerts
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO __name__:performance_monitor.py:97 PerformanceMonitor initialized WARNING __name__:performance_monitor.py:279 Performance alert: cache_hit_rate exceeded warning threshold: 0.3 > 0.8 WARNING __name__:performance_monitor.py:279 Performance alert: cache_hit_rate exceeded error threshold: 0.3 > 0.6 WARNING __name__:performance_monitor.py:279 Performance alert: cache_hit_rate exceeded critical threshold: 0.3 > 0.4 --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- INFO:__name__:PerformanceMonitor initialized WARNING:__name__:Performance alert: cache_hit_rate exceeded warning threshold: 0.3 > 0.8 WARNING:__name__:Performance alert: cache_hit_rate exceeded error threshold: 0.3 > 0.6 WARNING:__name__:Performance alert: cache_hit_rate exceeded critical threshold: 0.3 > 0.4
